params._comment: Renderer knobs the hill-climb tunes. The brain (codex) edits these each round to address the top critique. merchants = rotation; run_loop sets active 'merchant' = merchants[round % len]. NOTE: cached render mode only has Sprouts example JSONs in screenshots/synthetic_receipts, so we start Sprouts-only; adding Vons needs the bundle pipeline (verify_synthetic_replay local-pipeline) — a follow-up.
